title: Research row-level vs page-level locking
description:
Produce a comprehensive findings.md document on row-level vs page-level locking in relational databases. Include:
- Key differences between row-level and page-level locking strategies
- Advantages and disadvantages of each approach
- Specific performance metrics or contention figures (e.g., throughput numbers, latency improvements, contention rates)
- Real-world examples from database systems
- Trade-offs and use cases

Be thorough so the writer has concrete figures to work with for the brief.

title: Write brief on row-level vs page-level locking
description:
Write brief.md synthesizing the findings from research. The brief should:
- Concisely explain row-level vs page-level locking (what they are, key trade-offs)
- Include at least ONE specific performance or contention figure from the research (e.g., "row-level locking reduced contention by X%", "page-level locking achieved Y throughput")
- Be clear and accessible to technical readers
- Be 400-600 words

Note: If findings.md lacks a concrete numeric figure, pause and ask the researcher for one before completing the brief.
